query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_monthly_close` (
  `id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `month` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `missing_close_dates` json,
  `summary` json,
  `report_pdf_url` text,
  `closed_by` bigint,
  `closed_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`closed_by`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_monthly_close_audit` (
  `id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `monthly_close_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `action` enum('generate', 'close', 'reopen', 'export_pdf') NOT NULL,
  `actor_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `reason` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`monthly_close_id`) REFERENCES `accounting_monthly_close`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`actor_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);
